skills.name: acceptance-criteria-writer
skills.summary: Converts a feature idea or bug report into clear, observable, and verifiable acceptance criteria.

skills.name: accessibility-validation-planner
skills.summary: Plans accessibility validation across semantic, keyboard, focus, screen-reader, zoom, contrast, motion, and automated checks.

skills.name: agent-workstream-planner
skills.summary: Divides a project into coordinated workstreams with explicit ownership, dependencies, handoffs, collision controls, and integration checkpoints.

skills.name: architecture-decision-planner
skills.summary: Identifies pre-implementation architecture decisions and prepares alternatives, trade-offs, criteria, evidence needs, owners, and deadlines.

skills.name: before-after-diff-summary
skills.summary: Converts noisy Git diffs into human-readable before-and-after behavior summaries.

skills.name: constraint-mapper
skills.summary: Maps technical, time, budget, platform, accessibility, privacy, and maintenance constraints to concrete planning decisions.

skills.name: data-model-planner
skills.summary: Plans entities, relationships, validation, ownership, lifecycle, and migration concerns without generating implementation code.

skills.name: dead-code-spotter
skills.summary: Finds likely unused exports, functions, CSS selectors, assets, dependencies, and obsolete files.

skills.name: demo-coverage-planner
skills.summary: Plans demo sets that collectively cover core usage, configuration, errors, accessibility, and advanced behavior.

skills.name: dependency-purpose-summary
skills.summary: Explains why each declared dependency exists and flags packages whose purpose is unclear, misplaced, or duplicated.

skills.name: developer-note-writer
skills.summary: Turns implementation details into brief, technically accurate developer-facing notes for READMEs, examples, and documentation.

skills.name: docs-discoverability-audit
skills.summary: Audits technical documentation for navigation, information architecture, internal linking, content findability, duplication, and technical SEO.

skills.name: edge-case-test-planner
skills.summary: Identifies unusual states, malformed inputs, race conditions, lifecycle problems, and recovery scenarios for targeted test planning.

skills.name: example-progression-planner
skills.summary: Orders examples from minimal setup through realistic workflows and advanced integration.

skills.name: feature-priority-planner
skills.summary: Ranks proposed features by user value, implementation cost, dependency impact, risk, and portfolio value.

skills.name: github-social-preview-generator
skills.summary: Creates a repository-specific GitHub social preview image from project content, branding, screenshots, and metadata.

skills.name: implementation-checkpoint-planner
skills.summary: Adds evidence-based review checkpoints after risky or foundational work before dependent tasks proceed.

skills.name: implementation-order-planner
skills.summary: Determines what should be built first using dependencies, uncertainty, integration risk, and validation value.

skills.name: implementation-plan-writer
skills.summary: Turns requirements and architecture decisions into an ordered implementation plan without writing code.

skills.name: interface-state-coverage-review
skills.summary: Reviews interfaces and user flows for missing, inconsistent, or poorly communicated states.

skills.name: layout-art-direction
skills.summary: Reviews or develops intentional graphic layout and art direction using hierarchy, composition, rhythm, typography, imagery, and responsive behavior.

skills.name: lifecycle-event-contract-review
skills.summary: Reviews a JavaScript or TypeScript plugin's lifecycle event contract across implementation, types, addons, tests, docs, and demos.

skills.name: microcopy-polish
skills.summary: Improves labels, helper text, errors, confirmations, buttons, empty states, and status messages without rewriting entire pages.

skills.name: milestone-planner
skills.summary: Groups work into meaningful milestones with entry criteria, completion criteria, risks, dependencies, and expected outcomes.

skills.name: missing-docs-spotter
skills.summary: Finds public APIs, options, events, behaviors, and examples that exist in code but are missing or incomplete in Markdown or HTML documentation.

skills.name: motion-behavior-planner
skills.summary: Plans purposeful UI motion behavior including intent, triggers, timing relationships, interruption, reduced motion, and performance boundaries.

skills.name: mvp-scope-planner
skills.summary: Defines the smallest coherent MVP scope with explicit inclusions, exclusions, validation criteria, tradeoffs, and follow-on triggers.

skills.name: phase-boundary-planner
skills.summary: Defines where project phases should end and begin using exit criteria, entry criteria, evidence, handoffs, dependencies, risks, and go/no-go gates.

skills.name: plan-to-issues-converter
skills.summary: Converts roadmap tasks into GitHub-issue-ready drafts with labels, dependencies, acceptance criteria, and definitions of done.

skills.name: portfolio-project-planner
skills.summary: Plans portfolio-oriented projects so implementation, documentation, screenshots, demos, architecture reasoning, and case-study evidence develop together.

skills.name: problem-validation-planner
skills.summary: Plans how to verify that a proposed problem is real, important, frequent, and worth solving before implementation begins.

skills.name: progressive-enhancement-planner
skills.summary: Defines baseline HTML, enhanced JavaScript behavior, failure recovery, and accessibility requirements for resilient web features.

skills.name: project-brief-builder
skills.summary: Converts a rough project idea into a structured brief with goals, users, constraints, success criteria, assumptions, and exclusions.

skills.name: project-concept-planner
skills.summary: Turns an undeveloped idea into a concrete project concept with a target user, core problem, value proposition, and initial boundaries.

skills.name: project-plan-reconciler
skills.summary: Reconciles project plans and roadmaps with actual repository progress, identifies drift, and produces a corrected execution sequence.

skills.name: project-roadmap-builder
skills.summary: Produces a phased project roadmap with goals, deliverables, dependencies, acceptance criteria, risks, and checkpoints.

skills.name: project-status-snapshot
skills.summary: Summarizes completed work, current state, blockers, decisions, next tasks, and deviations from the original plan.

skills.name: readme-change-sync
skills.summary: Checks whether a code change requires README updates to examples, options, events, imports, or compatibility notes.

skills.name: refactor-roadmap-builder
skills.summary: Breaks a large refactor into behavior-preserving stages with tests, compatibility checkpoints, and rollback boundaries.

skills.name: repo-demo-copywriter
skills.summary: Writes natural, technically accurate demo-site copy for repositories using actual package behavior, APIs, examples, and code.

skills.name: repo-next-steps-review
skills.summary: Reviews a repository's current state and recommends prioritized next steps.

skills.name: repo-public-profile-polish
skills.summary: Reviews a public repository's README, metadata, screenshots, demo links, and overall first-impression quality.

skills.name: repository-area-impact-planner
skills.summary: Identifies likely affected files, modules, APIs, tests, examples, documentation, configuration, and validation areas for a proposed repository change.

skills.name: repository-feature-plan
skills.summary: Plans how a proposed feature should fit into an existing repository's architecture, conventions, tests, documentation, examples, and demo surface.

skills.name: requirements-gap-finder
skills.summary: Reviews project briefs for missing requirements, unresolved decisions, contradictions, hidden assumptions, and vague acceptance criteria.

skills.name: responsive-behavior-planner
skills.summary: Defines how layout, controls, content priority, and interactions adapt across available space.

skills.name: scope-creep-guard
skills.summary: Reviews proposed additions against the project goal and classifies them as required, justified, deferred, or rejected.

skills.name: skill-quality-audit
skills.summary: Audits an Agent Skill for routing clarity, scope, executability, safety, portability, and repository consistency.

skills.name: small-refactor-planner
skills.summary: Creates a minimal behavior-preserving refactoring plan for one function, class, component, or module without expanding scope.

skills.name: task-context-packager
skills.summary: Creates the minimum evidence-backed context package an agent needs to complete one repository task.

skills.name: task-dependency-mapper
skills.summary: Builds a task dependency graph and detects blockers, cycles, unnecessary coupling, and safe parallel work.

skills.name: task-scope-clarifier
skills.summary: Clarifies a rough implementation request into a bounded task with explicit scope, likely affected files, acceptance criteria, risks, and a recommended first step.

skills.name: ui-design-direction-builder
skills.summary: Builds a coherent, implementation-ready visual and interaction direction for a web interface.

skills.name: user-flow-planner
skills.summary: Converts features into primary, secondary, failure, empty, loading, and recovery user flows before implementation.

skills.name: user-recovery-flow-planner
skills.summary: Plans recovery paths for user mistakes, invalid input, failed requests, expired sessions, interrupted workflows, and uncertain outcomes.
